method: one generated workspace installed twice by the same pinned yarn — PnP and node-modules (the control); each tool runs through yarn in both trees; a tool failing BOTH trees invalidates the run (scaffold problem), a tool passing the control and failing PnP is the finding; ms fields are single samples through `yarn exec` (yarn boot + PnP runtime init included) — diagnostic only, the ok booleans are the finding
